data.body: Phase 2 PR-status scan complete. data.to: Themed bundle of 7 open issues filed in the upstream parent project manaflow-ai/cmux that align tightly with c11's documented Socket focus policy and CLI hygiene. These are NOT c11 issue numbers; every #N in this ticket refers to an issue in manaflow-ai/cmux. Picks: #3098, #1418, #2839, #2984, #3129, #3065, #2951. Reporters to credit: @andy5090, @jasonkuhrt, @hummer98, @nengqi, @EtanHey, @austinywang, @shaun0927. Full rationale and per-pick credits in task note.
